command: $apiPid = (netstat -ano | findstr :3005 | Select-Object -First 1).Split(' ', [System.StringSplitOptions]::RemoveEmptyEntries)[-1]; if ($apiPid -and $apiPid -ne '0') { Stop-Process -Id $apiPid -Force }; Start-Sleep 1; cd api; npx prisma generate
